title: coryphantha glanduligera
intro: Coryphantha glanduligera, also known as the globular pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its unique, globular shape and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Coryphantha glanduligera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which have been reported to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
